name: suppliers
author: Makestack
description: Stores supplier and vendor records and links them to catalogue entries for quick sourcing reference

keywords.description: Renders a supplier badge with name and optional product URL

endpoints.name: get_vendor
endpoints.description: Get a vendor with its catalogue links

endpoints.name: delete_vendor
endpoints.description: Remove a vendor and all its catalogue links

endpoints.name: add_link
endpoints.description: Link a vendor to a catalogue entry

tables.name: suppliers_catalog_links
tables.description: Links between vendors and catalogue entries
